importantNote: This file documents the intended GoHighLevel stack. Store OpenAI and GHL credentials in server-side environment variables; do not commit real secrets.

workflowActions.name: Analyze uploaded wall photos
workflowActions.trigger: Website quote form submitted with photos or manual square footage
workflowActions.notes: Call /api/photo-estimate to classify wall sqft, damage tier, confidence, manual-review flags, and deterministic package price before GHL handoff.

workflowActions.name: Create or update contact
workflowActions.notes: Map contact fields, source tags, pipeline name, canonicalJob, estimate analysis, pricing output, and submitted photo file names from the website payload.

workflowActions.name: Create opportunity
workflowActions.notes: Place the opportunity in the Ready White Customer Jobs pipeline at the New Lead stage.

workflowActions.name: Send instant SMS
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for contacting Ready White. We received your property request and are reviewing your photos now. We'll follow up shortly with next steps.

workflowActions.name: Send confirmation email
workflowActions.subject: Ready White received your property request
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for reaching out to Ready White. We’ve received your property refresh request and our team is reviewing the details now.

workflowActions.name: Send internal notification
workflowActions.notes: Notify the Ready White team with contact details, property address, property type, notes, and submitted photo file names.

futureEnhancements: Durable photo storage if GHL attachments or long-term image retention are required
Estimate variance tracking from completed jobs
Vendor scorecards tied to damage tier and package
Missed-call text-back and review flywheel verification
